goal: Find one or more new orthogonal signals that independently add informational value and improve the base system without cannibalizing it.
global_constraints: Base system active-signal-v1@1 is frozen — never modify its rules, thresholds, hours, days, or execution logic.
Only genuinely new signal classes are allowed — no retuning, permutation, or filter relaxation of existing base inputs.
Every hypothesis must pass the full funnel: standalone → stability → integration → cannibalization → final report.
No brute-force parameter search; use small logical grids only.
All negative, neutral, and positive results must be recorded in research memory.
Cannibalism must be explicitly measured before any promotion.

stages.title: Запуск цикла и фиксация инвариантов
stages.objective: Lock the cycle around the immutable base and open a dedicated research project with a hypothesis map and naming scheme.
actions: Open a dedicated research_project for this cycle.
In research_map create axes: hypothesis_family, data_layer, direction, expected_missing_regime, status.
In research_record fix cycle invariants: base is frozen, old tuned families stay closed, acceptance only through the full funnel.
Save exact baseline-reference (active-signal-v1@1) in a separate record.
Define a unified naming scheme for candidates and run IDs.
success_criteria: Open project exists, hypothesis map is initialized, cycle rules are recorded, baseline reference is saved.

stages.title: Формирование пространства только новых гипотез
stages.objective: Build a short-list of genuinely new signal families that are not permutations of the exhausted base input space.
actions: Enumerate candidate families: missing-regime long specialists, new event-conditioned entries, new derivatives-state layers, cross-symbol routing, model-backed routing, exit-originated alpha.
For each family document why it is new, why it is not a duplicate of the base, which missing regime it targets, and which features/data would test it.
Reject families that rehash closed idea classes (v1–v12 history).
Produce a wave-1 short-list of hypotheses.
success_criteria: Wave-1 short-list exists with each hypothesis having a written justification of novelty relative to the base and prior history.

stages.title: Data contract и feature contract для каждой новой семьи
stages.objective: For every wave-1 hypothesis fix a precise data and feature contract — inputs, alignment, lookback, leakage surface — before any testing.
actions: For each hypothesis define a feature contract: input columns, construction method, decision-time info, lookback window, cross-symbol joins, event alignment.
If custom features are needed: validate with features_custom_validate, publish with features_custom_publish, verify materialized dataset.
If model-backed features are needed: prepare a separate train/validation/test split ensuring no train window leaks into the studied OOS segment.
For event hypotheses verify alignment and coverage separately.
Record human-readable interpretation for every new feature.
success_criteria: Each hypothesis has a clean data and feature contract with leakage risks explicitly addressed.

stages.title: Быстрый отбор через signal plausibility и feature profitability
stages.objective: Before expensive backtests, discard hypotheses that look empty, unstable, or too similar to the base at the feature level.
actions: Run a primary profitability scan for every new feature.
Check bucket behavior and monotonicity where meaningful.
Verify the effect is not driven by a single extreme bucket.
Compare coverage against the base: hours, days, regimes, event subspaces.
Remove candidates that appear to be hidden replicas of known rules.
success_criteria: Only hypotheses with preliminary signal plausibility and expected orthogonality remain.

stages.title: Standalone backtests новых сигналов
stages.objective: Determine whether each surviving hypothesis has independent trading value before any integration with the base.
actions: Build a minimal honest standalone version for each candidate.
If multiple entry forms are needed, use a small logical grid — no wide brute force.
Record for each standalone signal: net PnL, trade count, profit factor, max drawdown, PnL per trade, quarterly distribution, profit concentration.
Describe which market situation each signal targets.
success_criteria: Short-list of standalone candidates that are non-empty on their own.

stages.title: Stability и condition analysis
stages.objective: Filter out attractive but locally fragile signals; keep only those that survive window decomposition or honestly qualify as specialist signals for a specific missing regime.
actions: Run window stability analysis for every standalone finalist.
Run condition stability analysis on key conditions using backtests_conditions_run.
Identify weak windows and explain why the signal fails there.
Verify the result is not carried by a single large move.
If a signal works only in one sub-regime, document it — acceptable only if that regime is uncovered by the base.
success_criteria: Remaining signals are either broadly stable or honestly proven as specialist signals for a missing regime.

stages.title: Интеграция с active-signal-v1@1
stages.objective: Measure each surviving candidate's real incremental value on top of the unchanged base system.
actions: Integrate each surviving candidate with the base.
Compare only against the unchanged base.
Measure: net delta PnL, delta trades, delta PF, delta DD, change in the base's weak quarters.
Reject candidates whose integration degrades the overall profile, regardless of standalone beauty.
If integration degrades the profile, reject or send back for architecture rework.
success_criteria: Full integration picture exists for every standalone candidate.

stages.title: Cannibalization, ownership и new-entry proof
stages.objective: Prove that each remaining signal adds genuinely new entries rather than parasitizing on the base.
actions: Compute overlap rate with the base.
Count truly new trades, replaced base trades, and PnL attributable to genuinely new entries.
Run layer_compare and signal_ownership analysis.
Verify coverage expansion across hours, days, regimes.
success_criteria: Direct evidence exists showing which candidates genuinely expand the system.

stages.title: Walk-forward и финальная валидация финалистов
stages.objective: Submit every finalist to stricter walk-forward validation and pairwise compatibility checks.
actions: Run backtests_walkforward_start for every finalist.
Record walk-forward verdict, final uplift vs base, drawdown quality, new-entry proof verdict.
Check pairwise compatibility if multiple finalists exist.
Produce a final status per candidate.
success_criteria: Walk-forward is completed for all finalists with clear verdicts.

stages.title: Финальный отбор и решение по продвижению
stages.objective: Make an explicit promote / watchlist / reject decision for every hypothesis with full evidence trail.
actions: For each hypothesis assign one of: PROMOTE (integrate into mainline), WATCHLIST SPECIALIST (reserve for specific regime), REJECT.
Record main reason, evidence references, and cannibalism journal entry.

Verify operational checklist: base never modified, each hypothesis has novelty justification, each finalist has standalone, negative results recorded, final report written, honest answer on whether a new input layer was found.
Write the final cycle report.
success_criteria: Every hypothesis has a documented decision with evidence.
